scope: original TC4 visual asset / GUI / revealer equipment parity batch
changes: Copied original TC4 ModelWand rod/cap textures into the active runtime wand renderer path textures/entity/wand/*.png so caps/rods no longer resolve to missing/placeholder textures.
Copied original TC4 core item aliases for goggles, thaumometer/scanner, scribing tools, research notes, nitor, quicksilver, focus pouch, core foci, wand caps and wand cores.
Copied original TC4 GUI aliases for gui_arcaneworkbench, guiresearchtable2, gui_researchbook, research backgrounds, hud, hex1 and hex2 into active GUI paths.
Added ThaumometerItemRenderer using original models/scanner.png as a Forge 1.19.2 visual adapter and switched thaumometer model to minecraft:builtin/entity.
Registered the ThaumometerItem renderer through initializeClient without changing scan mechanics.
Added TC4GogglesLayer that renders the original models/goggles.png strip on the player head when real Goggles of Revealing are equipped.
Registered TC4GogglesLayer for player skins before the fortress armor layer.
Arcane Workbench aspect costs now render original aspect icons instead of modern flat color boxes.
Added Stage383-402 audit and wired it into GitHub Actions.
not_done_yet: Thaumometer still uses a Forge 1.19.2 flat/scanner-texture adapter, not a full scanner.obj model port yet.
Goggles layer uses original texture and head transform adapter, but full original model geometry still needs deeper porting.
Aura Node needs exact original frame/type/modifier blending audit, not just texture binding.
Research Table and Arcane Workbench still need pixel-coordinate and behavior deep audit against original GUI classes.
Infusion Matrix crafting exists, but full TC4 instability/failure/FX/recipe edge parity is not complete.
remaining_large_batches_estimate: 32-44 batches of ~20 stages for real 100% TC4 parity
